text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Mornin'...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sei! Morning! Did you not get enough sleep last night? Kinda hard to
believe with all the napping you do.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring that cheerful dig at my sleep habits... Can you blame me with
all this warm, toasty weather?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I work up a real sweat at training, so I'm ready to hit the hay by
the time I'm finished.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Just the other night, I fell asleep while standing on the scale in the
bath's changing room. Everyone saw my weight...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And you thought my sleeping habits were strange?
At long last, I have retuuurned!
Long time no see, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh... Wait, what?! Tsuru?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: That's right! Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi, reporting for duty!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, long time no see! So you're finally cleared to come back to
school, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's great, Tsuru! Are you feeling better?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Better than better—I'm great! After all that rest, my body's ready to put the pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe ease up on the gas this time, okay? You remember what
happened last time...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Urrrgh... Everyone's made their debuts already, while I haven't even raced once.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You can't help that you were sick... All you can do now is practice
lots!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You're right! So what if I'm lagging behind? That just means I
need to run faster!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Besides, there's still time till the Classic races! That's my
once-in-a-lifetime chance to shine like President Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Then let's aim to run in the Classics together!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Spe, thank youuu! Then it's a promise! Now, off I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You are just getting better, so don't overdo it!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Don't you worry! I'm ready to cut loose and fly, babyyy!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Wheeeeze!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ooooh... Think I might've... overdone it... Can't... go on!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: AHHH! Tsuru?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah... That did happen, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I really wanted to make it in time for the Classics, but unfortunately, my debut's been pushed back to after the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Tsuru, I...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I know it sounds bad, but! There's still the Derby and the Kikuka Sho,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I'll be on your heels by then, so for now, enjoy the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm! I'll train super hard so I can give you a good challenge! All
right, this calls for an extra post-training run tonight!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...You really are a hard worker, Spe.
There! All done, Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mngh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Oh my bad, my bad. Didn't realize you were sleepin'.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You just... smell like the sun, Gramps. Sitting next to you makes me so
sleeeepy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Now there's a new one! I smell like the sun, huh? Anyway,
look, Sky, I finished your lure!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Thanks, Gramps! Now come on, we gotta get to the river right
away!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there, don'tcha see the sun setting? We don't want you gettin'
lost in the dark, so let's leave the fishing for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Awww, but I wanna try out your lure now...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Remember, the key to fishing is patience.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: Just like running.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. Even if your friends are running faster than you, you
can still win as long as you stay calm and wait them out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: You know, it's my dream to see you grow up and run in the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
And if you end up actually winning? Why, I'd be the happiest man
alive...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh whoa, that nap went on for way too long.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ah geez, are you setting already, Mr. Sun? Why'd you have to make
the weather all warm and toasty anyway?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The dorms are about sixty kilometers away... I wonder if I can make it
before curfew.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The curtains rise on the first race of the Classic Triple Crown, the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The current favorite to win is Special Week, followed closely by Seiun
Sky and King Halo, rounding out this generation's big three!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As we speak, our racers are slowly making their way over from the
paddock, no doubt savoring every step of this tremendous moment in
their careers!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just who among the Golden Generation will be the one to actually
snatch the gold today?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Focus, focus... The Yayoi Sho was on this very track, so I just gotta run
like last time!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Maaan, hard to believe we're running in the Classics, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Did you see all the fans? And those cheers! This is nothing like the
races we've been running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But that's not gonna scare me! This is the first race of the Triple
Crown—I have to win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oooh, somebody's motivated.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess that's what it takes to be the best in Japan... That's the dream
your moms gave you, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup! They entrusted me with this precious dream, so I'll see it come
true!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Entrusted dreams, eh? You know, I've got one of those too... From my
gramps.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really? You do?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gramps has been looking forward to this day for a long, looong time.
He's always wanted to see me win a Classic race, you see.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Is that so! Then we're the same! I've got my moms' dream, and you've
got your grandpa's!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hold on now... I wouldn't say we're the same. Sure, his dreams are
part of why I'm here...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I'm running today for me. That's where we differ.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Even without my gramps pushing me to race, I'd still be running.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If you can't see the difference there, I think I've got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The Satsuki Sho... is mine for the taking.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Or is it? Hehehe, anyway, see you on the track...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: We're... not the same?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
After spending most of the race in a surprising second, Seiun Sky
picks up speed! She's rounding the final corner and making her break
for it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky has taken taken the lead, with King Halo in steadfast
pursuit! From the outside comes Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Just a little more! Come on... COME OOOON!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: But it's no use! Seiun Sky pulls further ahead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And Seiun Sky crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The victor and proud owner of the first crown is... Seiuuun Skyyy!
